title: helenium donianum
intro: Helenium donianum, also known as Don's sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium donianum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as colds and flu, and its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Helenium donianum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herb in traditional medicine.
